_about: Three anonymized personas representing common shapes in the cleaned 600-person mental health dataset. Each one is a synthesis — not a real individual — used for demo and pattern lookup.

personas.title: International student — anxious, isolated
personas.summary: First-year graduate student from India, lives alone, classes in a second language. Struggles with the academic pressure plus the cultural distance from home.
common_phrases: everyone here is so different from me
what_helped: Joining a peer group from the same country
Weekly call schedule with family at a fixed time
Naming the homesickness instead of fighting it

personas.title: Elderly Vietnamese parent — language isolation, grief
personas.summary: 78-year-old recently arrived in the US to live with adult children. Grief over the recent death of a spouse. Children work all day. No English. Watches news in Vietnamese, sleeps poorly.
common_phrases: không có ai để nói chuyện (no one to talk to)
I am tired of being a burden
what_helped: Vietnamese-speaking community center senior program (twice weekly)
Validation of the grief, not redirection
screening_recommendations: Cornell Scale for Depression in Dementia if cognitive concerns

personas.title: Recently laid-off father — shame, identity loss, suppressed
personas.summary: Mid-40s, sole earner, two kids, laid off three weeks ago in tech. Hasn't told extended family. Spends days applying to jobs. Snaps at family. Not sleeping.
common_phrases: I'm fine, I'll figure it out
I just need one more interview to land
they don't need to know yet
what_helped: Naming the shame out loud to one trusted person
Talking to spouse about the financial timeline together
Brief therapy focused on identity beyond role
